series_metadata.series_description: Documents supporting a statewide draw game promotion. Includes sales history before, during and after a promotion as well as, research of other lotteries' promotions. Includes supporting documents regarding Task Lists & Timelines, Meeting Minutes, Memos, Point of Sale Materials, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for six (6) years. Retain in cold storage, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete
